clusters.justification: These terms share foundational co-activation within salience and limbic systems, reflecting the broad functional axis of processing generalized emotional valence, arousal, and mood states.
This cluster encompasses mesolimbic and orbitofrontal circuitry functions dedicated to computing the subjective worth of stimuli to drive motivated behavior and goal-directed choices.

Operating primarily through the default mode network, this axis represents the high-level, internally-directed processing required to model complex abstract agents such as the self and others across time.
